_meta.lastEditedNote: Edit values below. See README.md for the field guide. Save via GitHub's web UI to publish.
_meta.thumbnailFields: Each episode has a `guest` (name shown on the thumbnail) and `subtitle` (credential under the name on the thumbnail). Both are editable.

site.title: The Winning Formula | Nasdaq
site.description: Nasdaq's original series connecting the business of sport with the business of capital.

items.headline: The Winning Formula Is Nominated for a Shorty Award for Best Branded Content Series
Reggie Bush Announces his New United Athlete Tour On The Winning Formula
Mercedes AMG PETRONAS Formula 1 Team and Nasdaq Launch a New Winning Formula Offshoot Called "Accelerating Leadership"
The Winning Formula is a 2026 Webby Honoree In the "Best Branded Podcast" Category
Terrence Murphy Announces The new Synergy Sports Capital Firm In Partnership with Reggie Bush
Former NBA MVP Derrick Rose Announces his New Book "The Pooh Print" on The Winning Formula

wordmarkFallback.title: The Winning Formula
wordmarkFallback.subtitle: Presented by Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One Team

hero.intro: We invite high profile guests from around the sporting world, from athlete entrepreneurs to league executives, to discuss the similarities and through-lines between the sports and business world.

featured.headline: Ownership, legacy, and the United Athlete Tour.
featured.subtitle: Super Bowl Champion · Founder, United Athletes Tour
featured.thumbnailAlt: Reggie Bush on The Winning Formula
featured.pullQuote: Super Bowl Champion Reggie Bush on launching the United Athletes Tour, the importance of ownership, and his top running backs of all time.
featured.body: Reggie Bush joins The Winning Formula to break down the launch of the United Athletes Tour, why athlete ownership is the next frontier, and how he ranks the all-time greats at running back.
featured.bylineMeta: Recorded at Nasdaq MarketSite, Times Square

episodes.subtitle: NBA MVP · Entrepreneur
episodes.title: Derrick Rose
episodes.description: NBA MVP Derrick Rose talks retirement, starting his own businesses, the impact Tom Thibodeau had on his career, and his relentless work ethic.

episodes.subtitle: CEO & Co-founder · CrowdStrike
episodes.title: George Kurtz
episodes.description: George Kurtz breaks down the parallels between racing and business, the power of CrowdStrike's partnership with Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 team, and what motivated him to invest in the team's future.

episodes.subtitle: Special Edition · The Winning Formula
episodes.title: Women's Sports, Built to Scale
episodes.description: A deep dive into the explosive growth of women's sports — from rising valuations to revenue growth to the infrastructure needed to sustain it. The data tells a different story than the old 'potential' narrative.

episodes.subtitle: Founder & CEO · Voice in Sport
episodes.title: Stefanie Strack
episodes.description: Stefanie Strack joins The Winning Formula to talk about why keeping girls in sports matters — and how we can break down the barriers holding them back.

episodes.subtitle: NBA Champion · Web3 Ambassador
episodes.title: Tristan Thompson
episodes.description: NBA Champion Tristan Thompson talks about the importance of financial literacy, being a Web3 Ambassador, and how the NBA has evolved over the past decade.

episodes.subtitle: 2x Masters Champion · LIV Golf
episodes.title: Bubba Watson
episodes.description: From the famous Augusta shot that earned him the green jacket to the future of LIV Golf, Bubba shares honest insights on leadership, innovation, staying true to his style, and expanding his impact beyond the course.

episodes.subtitle: Super Bowl Champion · Entrepreneur
episodes.title: Ndamukong Suh
episodes.description: Super Bowl Champion Ndamukong Suh joins The Winning Formula to talk retirement, entrepreneurship, the importance of financial literacy, and his toughest NFL opponents.

episodes.subtitle: Chief Communications Officer · Mercedes-AMG F1
episodes.title: Bradley Lord
episodes.description: Bradley Lord reveals how communications, leadership, and culture come together to build a high-performing team in F1.

episodes.subtitle: Third Driver · Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1
episodes.title: Valtteri Bottas
episodes.description: Valtteri Bottas discusses his winning formula for success, lessons learned from the track, and how he channels his competitive spirit into business ventures beyond motorsports.

episodes.subtitle: CEO · Monumental Sports & Entertainment
episodes.title: Ted Leonsis
episodes.description: Ted Leonsis shares his vision for the future of Monumental Sports & Entertainment, the rise of sports as an exploding asset class, and what it takes to serve the modern fan.

episodes.subtitle: CEO · IWC Schaffhausen
episodes.title: Christoph Grainger-Herr
episodes.description: Christoph Grainger-Herr, CEO of IWC Schaffhausen, joins us to discuss what makes the partnership with the Mercedes-AMG Petronas Formula One Team successful, the business lessons he has learned from Toto Wolff, and how IWC came to be involved with the F1 movie.

episodes.subtitle: NBA Veteran · Entrepreneur
episodes.title: CJ McCollum
episodes.description: NBA veteran CJ McCollum discusses how his career on the court prepared him for a successful business career and how the NBA has evolved since he was drafted.

episodes.subtitle: Professional Rock Climber · Honnold Foundation
episodes.title: Alex Honnold
episodes.description: No ropes. No room for error. Alex Honnold reflects on his El Capitan climb and breaks down fear, risk, and the mindset behind the impossible feat.

episodes.subtitle: 2x World Cup Champion · USWNT
episodes.title: Kelley O'Hara
episodes.description: Kelley O'Hara joins The Winning Formula to discuss the explosive growth of women's sports, the business case for investing in it, and how her podcast 'Sports Are Fun!' is helping reshape the narrative around athletes and media.

episodes.subtitle: Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team
episodes.title: Toto Wolff and George Russell
episodes.description: Mercedes AMG PETRONAS F1 Team Principal Toto Wolff and Team Driver George Russell join Nasdaq to discuss team mentality, resilience during a long season, and how they continue to be positive influences for Kimi Antonelli. The first episode of co-produced series 'Accelerating Leadership.'

episodes.subtitle: Captain · Philadelphia Union
episodes.title: Alejandro Bedoya
episodes.description: Alejandro Bedoya, Captain of Philadelphia Union, joins The Winning Formula to discuss his soccer journey, the growth of MLS, and building a career beyond the field.

episodes.subtitle: 6x NFL Pro Bowler · Mental Health Advocate
episodes.title: Brandon Marshall
episodes.description: Brandon Marshall sits down with Nasdaq to discuss the importance of raising mental health awareness, the emerging creator economy, and finding his voice.

episodes.subtitle: Super Bowl XLIV Champion · Champion Venture Partners
episodes.title: Marques Colston
episodes.description: Marques Colston joins The Winning Formula to share the details into the founding of his firm Champion Venture Partners and the growth of the sports asset class today.

episodes.subtitle: NBA All-Star · Founder, BIGFACE Coffee
episodes.title: Jimmy Butler
episodes.description: From his NBA stardom to his entrepreneurial coffee endeavor 'BIGFACE,' Jimmy Butler joins Nasdaq to share insights on adaptability and the power of pivoting.

episodes.subtitle: 11x Olympic Medalist · Founder, Always Alpha
episodes.title: Allyson Felix
episodes.description: Allyson Felix, the most decorated track and field athlete, discusses the growth of women's sports and how her talent management firm, Always Alpha, aims to support and strengthen the success of female athletes.

episodes.subtitle: NBA Hall of Famer · Business Leader
episodes.title: Isiah Thomas
episodes.description: Isiah Thomas joins The Winning Formula to discuss his successful business career after retiring from the NBA, his top point guards, and the impact LeBron James has had on the GOAT debate.

episodes.subtitle: CMO · Qualcomm
episodes.title: Don McGuire
episodes.description: Qualcomm CMO Don McGuire joins The Winning Formula from the Las Vegas F1 Grand Prix to discuss Qualcomm's success in partnering with some of the world's top sports franchises to help connect their brands to fans' passions.

episodes.subtitle: Pro Football Hall of Famer · Former 49ers QB
episodes.title: Steve Young
episodes.description: Hall of Fame quarterback Steve Young discusses his top three quarterbacks today, his career after football, and what it takes to succeed in the NFL in the modern era.

episodes.subtitle: 3x NASCAR Cup Series Champion
episodes.title: Joey Logano
episodes.description: After winning his third NASCAR championship, Joey Logano joined us at Nasdaq to reflect on the big win. Hear how his motivation to win has evolved throughout his career, how he prepares for races, and more.

episodes.subtitle: CEO & Team Principal · Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1
episodes.title: Toto Wolff
episodes.description: Mercedes AMG F1 CEO Toto Wolff discusses the growth of F1, 'Drive to Survive,' and the importance of resilient leadership.

episodes.subtitle: 2017 US Open Champion · Pro Tennis Player
episodes.title: Sloane Stephens
episodes.description: Professional Tennis Player Sloane Stephens joins Nasdaq on The Winning Formula to discuss her incredible career journey and living life on her own terms. From winning the 2017 US Open to founding the Sloane Stephens podcast and more — she shares how she continues to bring fun and hard work into everything she does.

episodes.subtitle: 2x Olympic Medalist · UCLA Gymnast
episodes.title: Jordan Chiles
episodes.description: Two-time Olympic medalist Jordan Chiles shares her gymnast journey and how the 'being that girl' motto has propelled her to overcome challenges and rise to the top.

slides.headline: From the end zone to the endowment.
slides.subhead: On founding Champion Venture Partners and translating locker-room discipline into disciplined capital allocation.

slides.photoAlt: Mercedes-AMG Petronas F1 team at Nasdaq
slides.headline: Accelerating leadership at 200 mph.
slides.subhead: Toto Wolff and George Russell on building a championship team and the business behind the grid.

slides.photoAlt: The Winning Formula with Kelley O'Hara
slides.headline: The business case for women's sports.
slides.subhead: On the explosive growth of women's athletics and how her podcast is reshaping athlete-led media.

slides.photoAlt: Alex Honnold on The Winning Formula
slides.headline: Risk, routine, and the economics of the impossible.
slides.subhead: The free-solo climbing icon on calculated risk, philanthropy, and long-term focus.

slides.photoAlt: The Winning Formula with Alejandro Bedoya
slides.headline: On the growth of MLS and building beyond the field.
slides.subhead: The Philadelphia Union captain on his soccer journey and the career he's building off the pitch.

people.name: Joel Kolani
people.title: Head of Brand Strategy & Creative Content · Nasdaq
people.bio: A former sports radio host with expertise across the NFL, NBA, MLB, European soccer, and F1. Joel leads brand storytelling at Nasdaq and brings a journalist's instincts to every conversation.

people.name: Poppy Shen
people.title: Journalist & Video Producer · Nasdaq
people.bio: A journalist and video producer with experience at Yahoo, AOL, and CNN. Poppy has covered stories spanning sports, culture, and the AAPI community, and brings depth and empathy to every interview.
